text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 16 

CANCER_BREAST_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for female/male breast cancer indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) breast cancer (female or male) indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries 
that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: —
